Grand Total Store Sales:
SELECT 
  COALESCE(Store, 'GRAND TOTAL') as Store,
  COUNT(*) as Rows,
  ROUND(SUM(CAST("Qty Sold" AS DOUBLE)), 2) as Qty,
  ROUND(SUM(CAST("Qty Sold" AS DOUBLE) * CAST(Price AS DOUBLE)), 2) as "Total Price",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN CAST("Qty Sold" AS DOUBLE) * CAST(Price AS DOUBLE) < 0 THEN CAST("Qty Sold" AS DOUBLE) * CAST(Price AS DOUBLE) ELSE 0 END), 2) as "Neg Total"
FROM dataset
GROUP BY ROLLUP(Store)
ORDER BY Store IS NULL, Store
Store Sales (2024-01-01 to 2026-04-01):
SELECT 
  COALESCE(Store, 'GRAND TOTAL') as Store,
  COUNT(*) as Rows,
  ROUND(SUM(CAST("Qty Sold" AS DOUBLE)), 2) as Qty,
  ROUND(SUM(CAST("Qty Sold" AS DOUBLE) * CAST(Price AS DOUBLE)), 2) as "Total Price",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN CAST("Qty Sold" AS DOUBLE) * CAST(Price AS DOUBLE) < 0 THEN CAST("Qty Sold" AS DOUBLE) * CAST(Price AS DOUBLE) ELSE 0 END), 2) as "Neg Total"
FROM dataset
WHERE CAST("Invoice Date" AS DATE) >= '2024-01-01' AND CAST("Invoice Date" AS DATE) <= '2026-04-01'
GROUP BY ROLLUP(Store)
ORDER BY Store IS NULL, Store
